code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut i = 0
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0
mut started = false
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if not started
        max_val = n
        min_val = n
        started = true
      else
        if n > max_val
          max_val = n
        end
        if n < min_val
          min_val = n
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
